text: BREAKING: Trump convened NSC Situation Room meeting May 11 with Vance, Rubio, Hegseth, Ratcliffe, Gen. Caine, and Witkoff. Renewed airstrikes on Iran and restart of Project Freedom Hormuz escort operations were both actively discussed, per multiple US officials. No decision announced yet.
verificationNote: Times of Israel confirmed NSC meeting and multiple US officials cited by Channel 12. CNN, PBS, Bloomberg all confirmed.

text: LEBANON UPDATE: Israel struck 30+ locations across south Lebanon and Bekaa Valley on Day 73. Lebanese Health Ministry: 51 killed in the past 24 hours including 2 medical workers — the 2nd deadliest single-day toll since ceasefire (after May 10's 39 killed). Drone struck bread distributors in Zebdine. 1.6M now displaced.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera confirmed 51 killed. Democracy Now confirmed 2 medics. Times of Israel confirmed drone bread strike.

text: OIL/ENERGY: Brent $103.98 (+30.2%), WTI $97.50 (+29.1%). Surged 3%+ after Trump rejected Iran ceasefire counterproposal as 'garbage'/'totally unacceptable.' OPEC output hit 36-year low in April: 20.55M bpd (down 420K bpd). UAE withdrawing from OPEC+. Gas $4.52 (stable). Hormuz Day 71 — effectively closed. Saudi Aramco CEO warned normalization may slip to 2027.
verificationNote: Bloomberg confirmed OPEC 36yr low. Fortune confirmed Brent price. CNBC confirmed WTI. Saudi Aramco CEO quote per Washington Post.

text: HORMUZ NAVAL: Iran deployed Ghadir-class midget submarines in the Strait of Hormuz per IRGC naval commander — 'fully prepared to deter and destroy any hostile threats.' Iran has 16+ Ghadir vessels; each carries 2 torpedoes or 2 C-704 anti-ship cruise missiles. CENTCOM now has 20+ warships enforcing blockade; 61 Iranian vessels redirected. USS Gerald Ford CSG returning to Norfolk after 322-day deployment.
verificationNote: Bloomberg confirmed Iran mini-sub deployment. The War Zone/CENTCOM confirmed 61 vessels redirected and 20+ warships. USS Ford departure confirmed.

text: DIPLOMACY: UK-France hosting 40+ nation Hormuz defense ministers summit May 12. HMS Dragon pre-positioning in region. France's Charles de Gaulle carrier already nearby. Iran deputy FM Gharibabadi threatened 'decisive and immediate response' to foreign warships. Araghchi expected at BRICS New Delhi May 14-15. Netanyahu told 60 Minutes: 'Iran war not over — enriched uranium must be taken out.'
verificationNote: UK Government press release confirmed summit. CBS News confirmed Netanyahu interview. India TV News reported Araghchi BRICS travel.

text: TREASURY ALERT May 11: US Treasury issued guidance telling American banks to flag suspected Iranian money-laundering networks using shell companies, multi-layered intermediaries, and crypto firms to smuggle sanctioned oil. Banks told to watch for newly-formed companies moving large amounts, IRGC-linked customers. Part of expanded Economic Fury campaign targeting Iranian oil revenues.
verificationNote: Washington Post confirmed Treasury bank alert on May 11, 2026. Press Democrat corroborated.
